solution: ```class Solution:
    def maximumTripletValue(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        max_val = 0
        for k in range(2, n):
            max_left = 0
            for j in range(1, k):
                max_left = max(max_left, nums[j])
                for i in range(j):
                    diff = nums[i] - nums[j]
                    if diff > 0:
                        max_val = max(max_val, diff * nums[k])
        return max_val if max_val > 0 else 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^3)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Triple nested loop checks every valid triplet (i,j,k) and keeps the maximum positive value of (nums[i]-nums[j])*nums[k]; returns 0 if all are non-positive.
